items.headline: The Athletic: Inside how Jalen Suggs channels his inner football player
items.description: The Magic guard was the first person to be named Minnesota Mr. Basketball and Mr. Football in the same year.

items.headline: Facts to know about Game 7 matchups in NBA playoff history
items.description: Dive deep into the stats and facts to know about Game 7 history in the NBA playoffs.

items.headline: NBA announces 73 players invited to participate at AWS NBA Draft Combine 2026
items.description: The annual AWS NBA Draft Combine will take place May 10-17 at Wintrust Arena and the Marriott Marquis in Chicago

items.headline: NBA Playoffs: What to expect in Spurs-Wolves series
items.description: Standout big men mark this series as spry San Antonio and playoff-tested Minnesota meet in a matchup of deep West squads.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Pistons-Magic Game 6
items.description: Efficiency at the free throw line and Orlando's defense on Cade Cunningham are among the key factors to watch in Game 6.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Lakers-Rockets Game 6
items.description: Houston may have the formula to reach Game 7, but must thwart the Lakers' rebuttal (and LeBron James in a Game 6) to do so.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Cavs-Raptors Game 6
items.description: Turnovers, bench minutes and consistent scoring are among the factors to watch as the Cavs vs. Raptors series heads to Game 6.

items.headline: Starting 5: Wolves & Knicks move on, Sixers force Game 7 & a preview of Friday's Game 6s
items.description: Minnesota and New York close out their series, Philly stays alive, plus we dig deep into the three Game 6s tonight.

items.headline: A 47-point halftime lead! Knicks build giant edge over the Hawks in Game 6
items.description: The Knicks set an NBA playoff record by taking a 47-point halftime lead over the Hawks in Game 6 of their first-round series.

items.headline: Timberwolves guard Ayo Dosunmu (calf) misses Game 6 vs. Nuggets
items.description: The Minnesota guard – who scored 43 in the crucial Game 4 victory – has been ruled out of Thursday's contest due to a calf injury.

items.headline: Bucks officially name Taylor Jenkins as next head coach
items.description: Jenkins coached the Grizzlies from 2019-25 and posted a 250-214 record that included 3 straight playoff appearances from 2021-23.

items.headline: Live Updates: Wolves and Knicks Advance, Philly Forces a Game 7
items.description: Live Updates: highlights, scores and all the storylines for these Game 6s across the NBA Playoffs

items.headline: Magic's Franz Wagner out with calf injury for Game 6 vs. Pistons
items.description: The Orlando forward injured his calf during Game 4 of the team's 1st-round series against Detroit.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Timberwolves back up the big talk, take down Nuggets for good in Game 6
items.description: Jaden McDaniels cashes every check he issued, the 'others' come up clutch & more as the Wolves advance to the semifinals.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Knicks close out Hawks in historic fashion during Game 6
items.description: New York’s record-breaking 1st half, which ends with a record 47-point margin, carries the Knicks into the conference semis.
